_readme: This is the entry point of the Section Skills Library. Read this file first to understand the library. Then read sections/[id]/definition.json for detailed specifications of each section.

library.purpose: A skill defining each landing page section — content slots, animations, transitions, and flow logic. Used to build landing pages rapidly by combining preconfigured sections.
library.cms: Payload CMS — each section has a list of cms_fields in definition.json

sections.name: Navigation Bar
sections.summary: Logo + nav links + CTA button. Sticky on scroll with backdrop blur. Variants: centered-logo, left-logo, minimal.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.summary: Main headline + CTA. Answers: 'Does this product solve my problem?'. Variants: centered, split-right, split-left, fullscreen-bg.
key_animations: scroll parallax (text fade up, media slow-scroll)
sections.transition_out: soft-edge gradient or wave-divider to next section

sections.name: Logo Bar / Social Proof Strip
sections.summary: Client logos. Builds trust immediately after hero. Variants: static-row, marquee-scroll, marquee-dual.

sections.name: Features Grid
sections.note: features-grid OR how-it-works — usually only need one
sections.summary: Grid cards explaining product features/benefits. Variants: 3-col-grid, 2-col-grid, bento-grid, horizontal-list.

sections.name: How It Works / Steps
sections.note: features-grid OR how-it-works — usually only need one
sections.summary: 3-4 steps explaining the user process. Variants: horizontal-numbered, alternating-media, vertical-timeline, tab-switcher.
key_animations: oversized decorative step numbers in background

sections.name: Product Showcase / Demo Preview
sections.summary: Highlighted projects/portfolio showcase. Variants: minimalist-outlined-list, stacking-cards-sticky.
key_animations: sticky stacking cards on scroll (scale + rotation)

sections.name: Stats Bar / Numbers
sections.summary: 3-5 key metrics (users, revenue, uptime...). Variants: inline-row, cards.
key_animations: count-up number animation when scrolling into viewport (0→target, 2s easeOut)

sections.name: Testimonials / Reviews
sections.summary: Quotes from actual customers. Placed before pricing to reduce friction. Variants: 3-col-grid, carousel, masonry, featured-quote.

sections.name: Pricing Section
key_animations: price counter animation when toggling monthly/annual

sections.name: Blog Section / Listing
sections.summary: Main headline + articles list/bento/rows. Ideal for content pages or resources. Variants: horizontal-split-hero, asymmetric-bento-grid, sticky-sidebar-grid, alternating-row-list.

sections.name: FAQ Accordion
sections.summary: Reduce objections before the user exits. Placed after pricing. Variants: single-col, 2-col, side-by-side.

sections.name: CTA Banner / Final Conversion
sections.summary: Final conversion point. Strong visual break. Variants: centered-gradient, centered-card, split-text-visual.

sections.name: Section & Page Transitions
sections.summary: Visual bridges and dividers between pages or sections. Variants: gradient-fade-bridge, reveal-curtain-depth, skew-diagonal-cut, svg-wave-morph, magnetic-scroll-tracking, slide-clip-path, organic-sketch-overlap.

sections.name: Footer
sections.summary: Links, legal info, social icons. Always the final section. Variants: 4-col (standard), minimal, mega-footer.

templates.name: Payload CMS Landing — Full
templates.use_when: Use when a full landing page is requested. Ideal for SaaS/CMS products with logos, testimonials, and pricing.

templates.name: SaaS Landing — Minimal
templates.use_when: For new products without logos or stats. Keeps the page short with a single-focus CTA.

templates.name: Portfolio / Agency Landing
templates.use_when: For agencies, studios, or freelancers. Does not sell SaaS subscription plans; showcase is used as a portfolio gallery.

templates.name: Web3 Interactive Portfolio
templates.use_when: Custom Web3 portfolio using immersive 3D orbits and interactive outlined lists.
